proof: function(x0: Real) { (if x0.is_negative { -x0 } else { x0 }) = x0.abs }(0)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 - x1 = x0 }(0, x)
function(x0: Real) { 0 + x0 = x0 }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(x, x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(x, y)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](x, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(x, -y, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(y, -y)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = 0 }(y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(0, x)
function(x0: Real) { 0 + x0 = x0 }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 - x1 != 0 or x0 = x1 }(0 + y, y)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](x, y)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](y, x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { -x0 + -x1 = -(x0 + x1) }(x, -y)
function(x0: Real) { --x0 = x0 }(y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(y, -x)
function(x0: Real) { (-x0).abs = x0.abs }(x - y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(y, x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(x, y)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](x, y)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](y, z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(x, -y, y + -z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(-y, y, -z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(y, -y)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = 0 }(y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 - x1 != 0 or x0 = x1 }(0 + -z, -z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 - x1 = x0 }(0, -z)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](x, z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(x, z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(x, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(y, z)

goal: forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { real_distance(x0)(x1) = 0 implies x0 = x1 }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { real_distance(w0, k0) = 0 and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: Real satisfy { real_distance(w0, w1) = 0 and w1 != w0 }
let w2: Real satisfy { real_distance(w0, w2) = 0 and w2 != w0 }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { 0 != real_distance(x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)
let w0: Real satisfy { real_distance(w0, w0) != 0 }
function(x0: Real) { 0 = real_distance(x0, x0) }(w0)

goal: forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { real_distance(x0)(x1) = real_distance(x1)(x0) }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { real_distance(k0, w0) != real_distance(w0, k0) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { real_distance(w1, w0) != real_distance(w0, w1) }
let w2: Real satisfy { real_distance(w2, w0) != real_distance(w0, w2) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { real_distance(x0, x1) = real_distance(x1, x0) }(w0, w2)

goal: forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { real_distance(x0)(x2) <= real_distance(x0)(x1) + real_distance(x1)(x2) }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { not real_distance(w0, k1) <= real_distance(w0, k0) + real_distance(k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Real) { not real_distance(w0, k2) <= real_distance(w0, w1) + real_distance(w1, k2) } }
let w2: Real satisfy { not real_distance(w0, w2) <= real_distance(w0, w1) + real_distance(w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { not real_distance(w0, k3) <= real_distance(w0, w3) + real_distance(w3, k3) } }
let w4: Real satisfy { not real_distance(w0, w4) <= real_distance(w0, w3) + real_distance(w3, w4) }
let w5: Real satisfy { not real_distance(w0, w5) <= real_distance(w0, w3) + real_distance(w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { real_distance(x0, x1) <= real_distance(x0, x2) + real_distance(x2, x1) }(w0, w5, w3)

goal: is_cauchy_metric[Real](q) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_metric_bound(q, k0, x0) } }
proof: function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: Nat -> T0) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_metric_bound[T0](x0, k0, x1) } } = is_cauchy_metric[T0](x0) }[Real](q)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_metric_bound(q, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { not cauchy_metric_bound(q, x1, x0) }) }(eps)

goal: cauchy_metric_bound(q, n, eps) = forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { n <= x0 and n <= x1 implies q(x0).distance(q(x1)) < eps }
proof: function[T1: MetricSpace](x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> T1, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x3 or not x0 <= x4 or x1(x3).distance(x1(x4)) < x2 } = cauchy_metric_bound[T1](x1, x0, x2) }[Real](n, q, eps)
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or q(x0).distance(q(x1)) < eps } = true)
function(x0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or q(x0).distance(q(x1)) < eps } = true }(i)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not (n <= x0 and n <= x1 and not q(x0).distance(q(x1)) < eps) }(i, j)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(q(i), q(j))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(q(i), q(j), eps)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and k0 <= x1 implies q(x0).is_close(q(x1), eps) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat) { not forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or not x0 <= x2 or q(x1).is_close(q(x2), eps) } }(n)
function(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and x0 <= k1 and not q(k0).is_close(q(k1), eps) } }(n)
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { n <= w0 and n <= k0 and not q(w0).is_close(q(k0), eps) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and n <= w1 and not q(w0).is_close(q(w1), eps) }
let w2(arg0: Nat) -> w2_result: Nat satisfy { exists(k1: Nat) { arg0 <= w2_result and arg0 <= k1 and not q(w2_result).is_close(q(k1), eps) } }
function(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= w2(x0) and x0 <= k0 and not q(w2(x0)).is_close(q(k0), eps) } }(n)
let w3: Nat satisfy { n <= w2(n) and n <= w3 and not q(w2(n)).is_close(q(w3), eps) }
let w4(arg0: Nat) -> w4_result: Nat satisfy { arg0 <= w2(arg0) and arg0 <= w4_result and not q(w2(arg0)).is_close(q(w4_result), eps) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or q(x0).is_close(q(x1), eps) }(w2(n), w4(n))
function(x0: Nat) { x0 <= w2(x0) and x0 <= w4(x0) and not q(w2(x0)).is_close(q(w4(x0)), eps) }(n)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { lib(real.cauchy_criterion).is_cauchy_seq_at(x0, x1) } = is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(q)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not k0 <= x1 or not k0 <= x2 or q(x1).is_close(q(x2), x0) } } } = true)
let w0: Real satisfy { not lib(real.cauchy_criterion).is_cauchy_seq_at(q, w0) }

function(x0: Real, x1: Nat -> Real) { (not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not k0 <= x2 or not k0 <= x3 or x1(x2).is_close(x1(x3), x0) } }) = lib(real.cauchy_criterion).is_cauchy_seq_at(x1, x0) }(w0, q)
not lib(real.cauchy_criterion).is_cauchy_seq_at(q, w0)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { x1 <= k0 and x1 <= k1 and not q(k0).is_close(q(k1), x0) } }) }(w0)

goal: converges_to(q, a) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(q, a, k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = converges_to(x0, x1) }(q, a)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(q, a, k0, eps) }
proof: (forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(q, a, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { not tail_bound(q, a, x1, x0) }) }(eps)

goal: tail_bound(q, a, n, eps) = forall(x0: Nat) { n <= x0 implies q(x0).is_close(a, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x4 or x1(x4).is_close(x2, x3) } = tail_bound(x1, x2, x0, x3) }(n, q, a, eps)
(forall(x0: Nat) { not n <= x0 or q(x0).is_close(a, eps) } = true)
function(x0: Nat) { not (n <= x0 and not q(x0).is_close(a, eps)) }(i)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(q(i), a, eps)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(q(i), a)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { metric_tail_bound(q, a, k0, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Nat) { not metric_tail_bound(q, a, x0, eps) }(n)
let w0: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and not q(w0).distance(a) < eps }
function(x0: Nat) { not n <= x0 or q(x0).distance(a) < eps }(w0)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: T0) { not forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { metric_tail_bound[T0](x0, x1, k0, x2) } } or tendsto_metric[T0](x0, x1) }[Real](q, a)
function(x0: Real) { not converges_to(q, x0) }(lib(real.real_seq).limit(q))

goal: forall(x0: Nat -> Real) { is_cauchy_metric[Real](x0) implies exists(k0: Real) { tendsto_metric(x0, k0) } }
proof: let w0: Nat -> Real satisfy { is_cauchy_metric[Real](w0) and forall(x0: Real) { not tendsto_metric(w0, x0) } }
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { not is_cauchy_metric[Real](x0) or exists(k0: Real) { tendsto_metric(x0, k0) } }(w0)
is_cauchy_metric[Real](w0)
(forall(x1: Real) { not tendsto_metric(w0, x1) } = true)
let w1: Real satisfy { tendsto_metric(w0, w1) }
function(x0: Real) { not tendsto_metric(w0, x0) }(w1)
